text.title: Lemon Squeezy Ops Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules every Lemon Squeezy operation must satisfy. Hard rules; designed to prevent double-VAT, license bypass, dunning gaps, and affiliate churn.

rule.statement: Every LS store carries 6 mandatory fields: store_id, store_name, currency (usd | eur), refund_policy (one of LS enums), uses_mor=true, variant_count (1-8 active variants).

rationale.source: LS dashboard data on store-setup completeness

rule.rationale: Stores missing any of the six fields cannot publish variants reliably; LS rejects payouts on incomplete stores.

rule.statement: Lemon Squeezy acts as Merchant of Record. You do NOT collect VAT/GST yourself on LS-billed transactions. Your invoicing system must NOT issue a separate VAT invoice for those sales.

rationale.source: LS MoR terms; EU VAT framework

rule.rationale: Double-taxing the buyer is the most expensive LS mistake — leads to chargebacks and possible account suspension. LS remits VAT and provides MoR receipts.

rule.statement: For software / license-keyed variants, license key delivery uses Lemon Squeezy's License API. The client validates the key at startup and on a daily cadence.

rationale.source: LS License API docs; piracy-mitigation patterns

rule.rationale: Hard-coded keys defeat the purpose. License API also lets you revoke keys on refund without rebuilding the binary.

rule.statement: Failed renewals trigger a 3-email dunning sequence: T+1 (soft reminder), T+4 (payment-method update CTA), T+8 (final notice + grace-period offer). After T+10, subscription is auto-cancelled with a re-subscribe link.
rule.rationale: Three-touch dunning recovers 35-45% of failed renewals; single-email recovers <15%.

rule.statement: Affiliate commission is set between 30% and 50% for indie LS launches. Below 30% does not motivate; above 50% leaves the founder margin-thin on LS fees.
rule.rationale: 30% is the engagement floor; 50% is the ceiling where founder still nets positive after LS fees.

rule.statement: Monthly: pull LS dashboard CSV. Compute conversion_rate, refund_rate, mrr per variant. Promote top 2 to feature spots; demote bottom 2 (archive or unbundle).
rule.rationale: Without monthly pruning, the catalogue rots and dashboard noise hides the few variants that compound.

rule.statement: When preconditions in Applies-If hold and no Skip-If trigger applies, walk the 6-step procedure end-to-end and run the validator before publishing the store.

rationale.source: F-066 v3 B5.6 — mandatory run leaf

rule.rationale: Decision-tree run leaf for canonical execution path.

rule.statement: Skip this methodology when the Applies-If preconditions are not met OR any Skip-If disqualifier holds.

rationale.source: F-066 v3 B5.6 — mandatory skip leaf

rule.rationale: Decision-tree skip leaf for non-applicable inputs.
